text: Science has a clearer story about metamorphic rocks than social media does. Metamorphic rocks are formed deep within the Earth, where intense heat and pressure work their magic. Imagine granite turning into gneiss, or limestone morphing into marble. It's nature's own art! Each metamorphic rock tells a story of its journey, shaped by temperature, pressure, and time. So, next time you see a rock, remember—it might just be hiding a remarkable transformation. Like and follow for more amazing science insights!
